ORDER COMPELLING ARBITRATION AND PARTIALLY STAYING PENDING ACTION.

DEFENDANTS ROBERT NEGER AND LORRAINE NEGER PETITION AND MOTION ARE GRANTED, AS FOLLOWS; IF PLAINTIFF WISHES TO PURSUE HIS CLIAMS AGAINST DEFENDANTS, HE SHALL SUBMIT THEM TO BINDING ARBITRATION WITH THEM IN SF WITH, AND UNDER THE RULES OF THE AMERICAN ARBITRATION ASSOCIATION. AS TO DEFENDANTS DON BOULTINGHOUSE, ROBERT NEGER AND LORRAINE NEGER ONLY, ALL PROCEEDINGS IN THIS COURT SHALL BE STAYED IN ALL RESPECTS UNTIL THE ISSUANCE OF THE AWARD AND THE INCLUSION OF SAID ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS.SAID ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS SHALL BE STAYED PENDING RESOLUTION OF THIS ACTION.
